code: import{createContext,useContext,useState,useEffect}from'react';import{jsx as _jsx}from"react/jsx-runtime";const LangContext=/*#__PURE__*/createContext();export function LangProvider(_ref){let{children}=_ref;const[lang,setLang]=useState('en');const isAr=lang==='ar';const toggle=()=>{const next=isAr?'en':'ar';setLang(next);document.documentElement.setAttribute('dir',next==='ar'?'rtl':'ltr');document.documentElement.setAttribute('lang',next);document.title=next==='ar'?'طاولة | Tawla — نظام تشغيل المطعم الذكي':'Tawla | طاولة — The Smart Restaurant OS';};const t=(en,ar)=>isAr?ar:en;return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(LangContext.Provider,{value:{lang,isAr,toggle,t},children:children});}export function useLang(){return useContext(LangContext);}
